$comment: Layer C for DUES vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (REDEFINES R1a, docs/redefines.md). Input position 0 is the cents integer (domain WS-CENTS, PIC 9(6)); WS-DOLLARS REDEFINES WS-CENTS, so a read of WS-DOLLARS resolves to WS-CENTS at a shifted scale (value * 10^(0-2)) - a pure decimal shift, affine in the input. The 5% fee rounding half-boundary and the 100.00 tier boundary are both affine obligations the engine solves directly.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 DUES (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-dues)
